She has the habit of approaching sexual topics in a straightforward manner, a trait which was ingrained into her by her mother at an early age, hence the name.

He has an unrequited crush on Shuuko. Aya harbors a hatred for Tanaka-sensei, and initially did not like Kou due to his relation to him. He is good at Math.

name: Chinpira
description: __Height:__ 175 cm __Estimated Prison Sentence:__ 4 years Chinpira is greedy and is involved with crimes for money. He tries to act bold, but ultimately, he's a coward who believes that "if you can't beat them, join them." However, thanks to his weakness, he can show consideration to his comrades. He's a pathological liar and likes ramen.

name: Draluc
description: Draluc is an immortal higher vampire from the prestigious Dragon Clan who keeps dying and turning to dust from all kinds of small things. As his castle was destroyed, he moved in with Ronaldo, much to the other's dismay. Draluc is a typical-looking adult vampire with pale and boney complexion, pointy ears and nose. He has round lazy eyes, short black hair that is combed backwards.

Chiba is a serious and stoic boy. He's very calm and doesn't talk a lot. He is the best marksman among all of Class 3-E. He excels in spatial calculation and, as such, is unmatched in long distance shooting. His abilities have even earned him the praises of Lovro, a hitman dealer and a retired assassin.
